description_long: This is a robust, industrial-style storage box constructed primarily from weathered wooden planks, reinforced at the edges with thick, riveted metal bands. The wood has a grayish tone, showing natural grain patterns and knots, giving it a rugged, utilitarian appearance. The metal frame is slightly worn, with visible rivets providing structural strength and a sense of durability. One side of the box is prominently marked with the word 'DANGER' in bold red stencil, suggesting it is used to store hazardous or sensitive materials. The top surface is flat and bordered by the same metal reinforcement, making it suitable for stacking or supporting other objects. There are no visible handles, locks, or openings, and the box appears to be fully enclosed.
description: A heavy-duty wooden storage box with metal-reinforced edges and a bold red 'DANGER' label on one side. The box has a rugged, industrial look with weathered wood and visible rivets.
description_view_0: This view shows a plain wooden side with metal reinforcement and no markings.
description_view_1: This side is similar to view 0, featuring plain wood and metal edges, with no visible labels.
description_view_2: This view displays another unmarked wooden side, bordered by riveted metal, with natural wood grain visible.
description_view_3: This is the front view, featuring the red 'DANGER' stencil on the wooden panel, framed by metal.
attribute_labeling_or_signage: red 'DANGER' stencil label on one side
